text:
Good! Now I've fixed both issues:

## ✅ Fixes Applied

**1. Batch Swap Toast Timing**
- Now waits for all transactions to be confirmed on-chain
- Shows progress: "Submitting...", "Waiting for confirmation...", then "Completed"
- Only shows success after blockchain confirms

**2. Transaction History Amounts**
- Improved calldata decoding for ERC-20 tokens
- Extracts amounts from position 74-138 in calldata (standard ERC-20 transfer encoding)
- Better error handling and logging
- Shows correct token symbols and amounts

The history should now display accurate amounts for both regular swaps and batch swaps. Try performing a swap now and the toast will only show "completed" after the transaction is actually confirmed!
